_instructions.pdf_support: Place a PDF as 'slides.pdf' in the slides folder for embedded PDF viewer

title: Smart Parking Sensor
subtitle: Park Accurately Using Distance Detection!
overview: Students build a Smart Parking Sensor using an Arduino UNO, Ultrasonic Sensor, and multiple LEDs. As an object gets closer, more LEDs light up, helping drivers park accurately. Each LED represents approximately 10 cm of distance.

images._note: Add photos of the ultrasonic sensor setup, LED bar display, Arduino connections, and student projects.

gallery.caption: Arduino UNO controls the parking system

youtubeVideos.title: Arduino Ultrasonic Sensor Tutorial
youtubeVideos.desc: Learn how to measure distance using HC-SR04.

youtubeVideos.title: Smart Parking Sensor Project
youtubeVideos.desc: Build a parking assistance system using Arduino.

activity.title: Build a Smart Parking Sensor
steps: Place an object in front of the sensor
Observe LEDs turning ON as the object moves closer
Move the object away and observe LEDs turning OFF

quiz.q: Which sensor is used in this project?
quiz.explanation: The HC-SR04 Ultrasonic Sensor measures distance using sound waves.

quiz.q: What does the ultrasonic sensor measure?
quiz.explanation: Ultrasonic sensors calculate the distance to an object.

quiz.q: How does the HC-SR04 detect distance?
quiz.explanation: It sends ultrasonic sound waves and measures their return time.

quiz.q: What happens when an object gets closer?
quiz.explanation: As the distance decreases, additional LEDs turn ON.

quiz.q: What is the main purpose of this project?
quiz.explanation: The project helps drivers park accurately.
Arduino UNO processes sensor data and controls LEDs.

quiz.q: Why are resistors connected with LEDs?
options: To protect LEDs from excess current
quiz.explanation: Resistors limit current and protect LEDs.

quiz.q: What real-world system uses similar technology?
quiz.explanation: Many modern cars use parking assistance sensors.

quiz.q: What happens when the object moves farther away?
quiz.explanation: As distance increases, fewer LEDs remain ON.

quiz.q: What is a major benefit of smart parking systems?
quiz.explanation: Parking sensors help drivers avoid obstacles and park more accurately.
